an1.278:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, there is no opportunity, for two wheel-turning kings to arise simultaneously in a single world-system. That situation does not exist.
an1.278:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for one wheel-turning king to arise in a single world-system. That situation does exist."
an1.279:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, there is no opportunity, for a woman to be an *arahant*, a fully enlightened one. That situation does not exist.
an1.279:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for a man to be an *arahant*, a fully enlightened one. That situation does exist."
an1.280:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, there is no opportunity, for a woman to be a wheel-turning king. That situation does not exist.
an1.280:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for a man to be a wheel-turning king. That situation does exist."
an1.281-283:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, there is no opportunity, for a woman to hold the position of Sakka … or the position of Māra … or the position of Brahmā. That situation does not exist.
an1.281-283:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for a man to hold the position of Sakka … or the position of Māra … or the position of Brahmā. That situation does exist."
an1.284:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, there is no opportunity, for misconduct of body to produce a result that is wished for, desired, and pleasing. That situation does not exist.
an1.284:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for misconduct of body to produce a result that is unwished for, undesired, and displeasing. That situation does exist."
an1.285-286:1.1: "It is impossible, *bhikkhus*, there is no opportunity, for misconduct of speech … or for misconduct of mind to produce a result that is wished for, desired, and pleasing. That situation does not exist.
an1.285-286:1.2: But it is possible, *bhikkhus*, for misconduct of mind to produce a result that is unwished for, undesired, and displeasing. That situation does exist."
